steps.title: Identify the role of the coefficient
steps.content: The formula converts kelvins to Fahrenheit. Substitute $h=539.33$ and isolate the fraction: $$539.33-32=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}.$$

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: So $507.33=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$, giving $v-273.15=\frac{5\cdot 507.33}{9}=281.85$ and $v=555$. The answer is 555.
